title: Senior Doctor - Symbiosis Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Symbiosis Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital:
Symbiosis Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital!
